title: Medical Laboratory Technologist
description:
Job Description:

  • Duties include working in pre-analytical, analytical, maintenance and troubleshooting of laboratory instrumentation, technical validation and inventory management.
  • Operates and maintains sophisticated instruments and equipment used in the laboratory.
  • Able to properly set up, calibrate, maintain, operate and shut down the analytical instruments.
  • Perform all procedures in accordance with Laboratory Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs).
  • Processes, analyses, verifies and release results within the expected turn around time.
  • Ensure compliance with all requirements of the Laboratory Safety Manual.
  • Ensure that “critical value” of lab results are reported timely to the relevant appropriate personnel as well as resolve queries from customers as needed.
  • Maintains competence in Laboratory Information System (LIS).
  • Maintains a safe and clean working environment by adhering to safety procedures and regulations.
  • Participates in Quality Improvement Programs and Proficiency Programs essential to ensure that laboratory testing is accurate, timely and meets customer needs.
  • Escalates lab issues to supervisors or lab management in a timely manner
  • Any other duties as assigned by Laboratory Manager.

Job Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree or Diploma in Biological Sciences/Biomedical Sciences/Medical Technology.
  • Preferably with some relevant experience.
  • A team player as well as working independently
  • Good working attitude and ability to work under pressure
  • Ability to do detailed work and maintain a high level of accuracy
  • Able to take up challenges
  • Good general health and no colour blindness
  • Strong verbal and written communication and organizational skills
  • Ability to adequately maintain accurate records and follow Standard Operating Procedures.

Work Week: 3 weeks 5 days, 1 week 6 days

  • Monday to Friday: 8.30 am to 5.00 pm OR 1.30 pm to 10.30 PM
  • Saturday: 10.00 am to 7.00 pm (3 Saturday Off, 1 Saturday Full)

Actual working hours might change due to operation requirements.


Use of Personal Data in Recruitment Process

We collect and use your personal data (e.g., name, contact info, resume) to process your job application.

Your data is shared with relevant personnel and protected with security measures.

By applying, applicants consent to the stated collection, use, and disclosure of their personal information.

postedCompany.description: Pathlab Singapore was established in 1952 and have over the decades been providing medical testing services to medical practitioners and specialists in Singapore. Along with our Malaysian counterparts, we have in recent years expanded our business operations to Thailand, Indonesia, Hong Kong, Vietnam, Myanmar and Cambodia. We are fully committed to constantly providing excellent service and accurate results for the industry. We have invested substantially in fully automated laboratory systems that perform our biochemistry tests and immunoassays with high efficiency and reliability. Our current economies of scale enable us to increase the menu of tests offered and frequency of tests resulting in improved turnaround time. Customer satisfaction is of utmost importance to us and we start each workday reminding our operations and service staff to attend to our clients promptly and effectively.
postedCompany.name: PATHOLOGY AND CLINICAL LABORATORY PRIVATE LIMITED
